def negative_repeated_file_open_for_same_resource_within_single_operation():
    rule_id = "repeated_file_open_for_same_resource_within_single_operation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag workflows that reopen the same file repeatedly during one logical operation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
